data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for simple cancellation (24-hour notice), but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that cancelling more than 24 hours ahead results in an automatic refund, there is no concrete evidence from the prior steps that demonstrates the cancellation process or the enforcement of the 24-hour notice requirement. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary API reads or persisted state checks to validate this requirement are absent.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of simple cancellation with 24-hour notice.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
